title: 在国外退菜别再说I don’t like it！🔥

cover.style_keywords: 清新手绘风、餐盘+对话气泡、柔和马卡龙色系、带小叉勺emoji元素

slides.correct_en: Could I possibly get this with less salt? I'm quite sensitive to sodium.
slides.correct_cn: 能麻烦这道菜少放点盐吗？我对钠比较敏感。

dialogue.a: A: Hi, could I possibly get this with less salt? I'm quite sensitive to sodium.
dialogue.a_cn: A：你好，能麻烦这道菜少放点盐吗？我对钠比较敏感。
dialogue.b: B: Absolutely! I’ll remake it right away — and I’ll add a little extra lemon to balance it.
dialogue.b_cn: B：当然可以！我马上重做——再加点柠檬提鲜平衡一下。

slides.tip: 用‘sensitive to…’把问题归因于自己身体，服务员秒懂且毫无压力～

slides.wrong_en: This is not what I ordered!
slides.correct_en: I think there might be a mix-up — I remember ordering the grilled salmon, not the tuna.
slides.correct_cn: 可能有点小误会——我记得点的是烤三文鱼，不是金枪鱼。

dialogue.a: A: I think there might be a mix-up — I remember ordering the grilled salmon, not the tuna.
dialogue.a_cn: A：可能有点小误会——我记得点的是烤三文鱼，不是金枪鱼。
dialogue.b: B: Oh my gosh, you're absolutely right — let me fix that for you right now!
dialogue.b_cn: B：天啊您说得对！我马上给您换！

slides.tip: 用‘I think…’+‘might’软化语气，比‘is not’温柔100倍，还显得你记忆力超好😉

slides.correct_en: I’m sorry to mention this, but I noticed the fish smells a bit off — would it be possible to swap it?
slides.correct_cn: 不好意思提一句，我发现这鱼闻起来有点异常——方便帮我换一份吗？

dialogue.a: A: I’m sorry to mention this, but I noticed the fish smells a bit off — would it be possible to swap it?
dialogue.a_cn: A：不好意思提一句，我发现这鱼闻起来有点异常——方便帮我换一份吗？
dialogue.b: B: Thank you so much for letting us know — I’ll take this back immediately and bring you a fresh one.
dialogue.b_cn: B：非常感谢您及时告知！我马上撤走，立刻给您上一份新鲜的。

slides.tip: 先道歉（softener）+客观观察（smells a bit off）+礼貌请求（would it be possible…），三步封神！

slides.correct_en: Would it be alright if this was warmed up just a touch? It’s a little cooler than I expected.
slides.correct_cn: 方便稍微加热一下吗？它比我预期的要凉一点。

dialogue.a: A: Would it be alright if this was warmed up just a touch? It’s a little cooler than I expected.
dialogue.a_cn: A：方便稍微加热一下吗？它比我预期的要凉一点。
dialogue.b: B: Of course — I’ll pop it in the oven for 90 seconds and bring it back warm and perfect.
dialogue.b_cn: B：当然可以——我放进烤箱热90秒，马上给您端回温热完美的版本！

slides.tip: ‘just a touch’是英美餐厅高频词，比‘a little’更自然，还带点可爱感～

slides.scene_title: 想换主食但不想显得挑剔
slides.wrong_cn: 我不想要这个，换一个吧。
slides.wrong_en: I don’t want this. Give me another.
slides.correct_en: Actually, would it be okay to switch this for the mushroom risotto? I realized I’m craving something creamy today.
slides.correct_cn: 其实，方便把这道换成菌菇烩饭吗？我突然特别想吃点绵密口感的～

dialogue.a: A: Actually, would it be okay to switch this for the mushroom risotto? I realized I’m craving something creamy today.
dialogue.a_cn: A：其实，方便把这道换成菌菇烩饭吗？我突然特别想吃点绵密口感的～
dialogue.b: B: Happy to! And I’ll add a little truffle oil on top — on the house.
dialogue.b_cn: B：乐意之至！我再给您淋点松露油——免费的～

slides.tip: 用‘I realized I’m craving…’把换菜包装成临时灵感迸发，服务员反而觉得你很有趣！

caption:
说错一句‘I don’t like it’，服务员可能直接微笑走开…真正管用的不是抱怨，是这3句‘软性退菜话术’！✨不是装客气，是老外真的靠‘委婉归因+具体反馈+请求协助’来解决问题～下次点错/踩雷/口味翻车，照着说，对方不仅秒换，还可能送你甜点🍰！你最常遇到哪种退菜场景？评论区蹲一个真实故事👇（悄悄说：收藏这篇，出国前翻3遍，稳赢）

#实用英语 #出国必备 #餐厅英语 #地道表达 #英语口语 #小红书英语课 #旅行英语
